svg.aria-label: Highlighted source capture for durable-treatment competitor evidence
svg.text: Ixo-vec allocation within durable-treatment class: competitor context
Saved source-text capture from public durable-treatment competitor sources.
RGX-314 / sura-vec wet AMD gene-therapy program context.
AXPAXLI durable intravitreal axitinib implant competitor context.
Use in model: competitors affect Ixo-vec share within durable options; no exact future share is sourced.
The 35% base-case allocation is a stated model assumption informed by these programs.
Sources linked in the card: 4D-150 Phase 3 context; RGX-314 program context; AXPAXLI program context.
